resultList.dtldesc: This spacious 3 BHK multistorey apartment offers a perfect blend of comfort and modern living in the highly sought-after residential hub of Manikonda, Hyderabad. Designed to cater to the needs of a contemporary family, the property provides a generous layout with ample natural light and cross-ventilation. Its strategic location within one of the citys fastest-growing suburbs makes it an excellent choice for those seeking a premium lifestyle with seamless access to major commercial and IT corridors.Property SpecificationsThe apartment features a substantial super area of 1,700 sq. ft, providing well-defined spaces for living, dining, and relaxation. The neighbourhood is well-served by public transport, and the proximity to the Outer Ring Road ORR allows for effortless commutes to different parts of Hyderabad. With numerous parks and recreational spots nearby, the locality offers a balanced and convenient urban lifestyle.

resultList.dtldesc: Presenting a modern residential opportunity in the heart of Hyderabad’s bustling IT corridor, this 2 BHK apartment in the prestigious Team 4 Nyla project, Miyapur, offers an elevated living experience. Positioned on the 19th floor of a contemporary high-rise, this west-facing home provides panoramic views of the city skyline and excellent natural ventilation. The property is a perfect choice for young professionals and families looking for a sophisticated urban sanctuary that combines luxury with the convenience of living in one of the city's most well-connected neighbourhoods.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment features a well-distributed super area of 1,200 sq. ft, designed with a focus on spatial efficiency and a modern aesthetic. This residence includes two spacious bedrooms and two well-appointed bathrooms, providing ample privacy for its occupants. A private balcony complements the living area, offering a serene outdoor space to enjoy the elevated views. The property is brand new and currently under construction, ensuring that the final finish meets contemporary quality standards. As an unfurnished unit, it serves as a versatile canvas for homeowners to design and furnish their dream interiors according to their personal professional requirements.::::Facilities::::Team 4 Nyla is equipped with a wide range of premium facilities designed to support a high-quality lifestyle. The gated community offers extensive recreational amenities, including a fully equipped gymnasium, a swimming pool, and a dedicated clubhouse for social gatherings. Practical needs are meticulously addressed with a consistent water supply, 100% power back-up, and high-speed lifts. Security is a top priority, featuring 24-hour surveillance and a professional security team to ensure a safe environment for all residents. The project also incorporates beautifully landscaped gardens and dedicated play areas, providing a balanced lifestyle of leisure and wellness within a secure perimeter.::::Locality::::Strategically located in Miyapur, the property benefits from its proximity to major commercial hubs and excellent transport links. The locality is a key residential node in North-West Hyderabad, offering seamless connectivity via the Miyapur Metro Station and the Mumbai Highway. The neighbourhood is home to several reputable educational institutions, including Sentia The Global School and Genesis International School. Healthcare facilities are readily available with Pranaam Hospital and Landmark Hospital located nearby. For shopping and recreation, GSM Mall and various supermarkets are within easy reach, ensuring that all essential services and leisure options are just a short drive away from this prime residential address.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover this contemporary 3 BHK residence situated in the thriving residential hub of Kompally, Hyderabad. Located within the secure and modern environment of the Suvarnabhoomi Suvarna Shanti project, this east-facing apartment is designed to offer a balanced lifestyle of comfort and elegance. The property benefits from a prime position in a rapidly developing neighbourhood, making it an ideal choice for families seeking a peaceful retreat with excellent connectivity to the citys major landmarks.Property SpecificationsSpanning a generous super area of 1,576 sq. ft, this brand-new apartment is positioned on the fourth floor of a five-storey building. The layout is thoughtfully planned to maximise natural light and ventilation, featuring three spacious bedrooms and three modern bathrooms. Offered in an unfurnished state, the property provides a versatile canvas for homeowners to personalise the interiors according to their unique style and requirements. The construction is complete and ready for immediate possession, offering the benefit of a modern architectural design in a newly developed estate.FacilitiesThe apartment comes equipped with a comprehensive range of facilities to ensure a sophisticated and convenient living experience. Residents have access to a well-equipped clubhouse, a gymnasium, and a swimming pool for leisure and fitness. Essential services include 24-hour water supply, 100 power backup, and a dedicated security team with CCTV surveillance to ensure a safe environment. The building also features modern lifts, a childrens play area, and beautifully landscaped gardens, providing a high standard of living for all age groups.LocalityStrategically located in Kompally, the property enjoys seamless access to the Outer Ring Road and the NH-44, facilitating easy commutes across Hyderabad. The neighbourhood is well-served by reputable educational institutions such as St. Martins Engineering College and DRS International School. For healthcare needs, hospitals like Surekha Hospital and Renova Hospitals are located in the vicinity. Shopping and entertainment options are plentiful, with the Cineplanet Multiplex and several supermarkets within a short drive. The area is also well-connected by public transport, with the Gundla Pochampally Railway Station nearby, making it a highly desirable residential destination.
